title: Class 4 Driver (Tipper Truck Driver)
description:
COMPANY DESCRIPTION

We are one of the largest one-stop Underground Utilities Infrastructure companies based in Singapore. We provide Underground Utilities Infrastructure construction and maintenance, sewer pipeline rehabilitation, road and airfield construction and maintenance as well as asphalt pre-mix production and construction waste recycling.

RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Safely transport construction materials, including soil, sand, and mill waste, to designated destinations.
  • Loading and unloading of materials, ensuring that all goods are securely and safely transported.
  • Work with site personnel to ensure efficient and safe unloading procedures.
  • Perform routine checks on the truck to ensure it is in safe working condition.
  • Maintain the general cleanliness of the vehicle, both inside and outside.
  • Drive in a safe and responsible manner, strictly adhering to all traffic rules and regulations as stated in the Road Traffic Act.
  • Report any vehicle defects, accidents, or incidents to the supervisor immediately.
  • Perform any other related duties as assigned by the immediate supervisor or HOD.
QUALIFICATIONS
  • Possess a valid Class 4 Singapore driving license with a good driving record
  • Minimum 1 year of experience driving tipper trucks
  • Strong familiarity with Singapore's road network and traffic regulations
  • Prior experience in logistics, construction, or delivery operations is an advantage
OTHER INFORMATION
  • Work Schedule: 5.5 days work week
  • Vehicle to be returned to the office located at No. 3 Sungei Kadut Drive, Singapore 729556 (North area)
  • Comfortable working in a non-air-conditioned environment

Sign-On Bonus Rewards:

  • $500 sign-on bonus after completing 1 month of service.

  • Additional $500 sign-on bonus after completing 6 months of service.

Employee Benefits

  • Transportation:
    • Enjoy a company-provided shuttle for easy transportation available from Woodlands and Kranji MRT Stations to the office for your convenience
    • Company-provided lunch bus for easy access to meals.
  • Annual Leave:
    • 7 days of annual leave, with additional leave based on tenure.
  • Telecommunication:
    • Exclusive sign-up benefits under our Corporate Telecommunication Scheme for personal plans.
  • Healthcare:
    • Access to Medical Teleconsultation services for quick, easy healthcare consultations.
    • Comprehensive medical benefits including dental care and health screenings.
    • Portable Medical Benefit Scheme (PMBS): Monthly contributions to your Medisave account for long-term healthcare security.
Please note that your application will be sent to and reviewed by the direct employer - Ley Choon Constructions and Engineering Pte Ltd
